title: Now Hiring Store Manager at MedPlus

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at MedPlus
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
